name: aggregator follows full order: _universal then plugin then _community then _operator
setup:
cat > tree/_universal/u.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: u
  authoritative_publisher: u
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/u
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:u
rules:
  - id: u-rule
    name: u
    description: u rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/u.sh
recommended_set: [u-rule]
all_set: [u-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/_community/myplug/myns/c.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: c
  authoritative_publisher: c
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/c
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:c
rules:
  - id: c-rule
    name: c
    description: c rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/c.sh
recommended_set: [c-rule]
all_set: [c-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/_operator/myteam/o.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: o
  authoritative_publisher: myteam
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/o
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:o
rules:
  - id: o-rule
    name: o
    description: o rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/o.sh
recommended_set: [o-rule]
all_set: [o-rule]
EOF
